textByHash.1a61b7d88c320b4473df5d5e0f6f6e6131b2ba18: Soon I be smart enough to speak to rocks!
textByHash.3157718d388873d3ed1e37a5e3ea733ed096ae82: I like weather since I got my name. My first food gave me shiny weather number getter.
textByHash.35e545efc3cc005e2b3a0006188e4283331ceeef: You already have another number getter. Go find where windys stop!
textByHash.5aaff3b8dedc3b6a8f8278dcd0144f1f5ef1e191: You already get me weather number here. Was very tasty!
textByHash.6ee85b6a414ee405ec09b206d4caf235cff412c5: You take my number getter! Find where windy no do the blowing, and it get numbers. Bring numbers back to me! I try myself, but I just follow wind round in circles. Make sure you no do that!
textByHash.8c5dc4394036693303b01355707e5652761783be: You already have number getter. Go find where windys stop!
textByHash.8fd4acd6e7f4908962dab160714a6ad63d25ccd7: 'ello sail her! I busy now. You come back later.
textByHash.99dbc21f30c34b81f0e602940a4cdc00cee64caa: Numbers so tasty. Weather here must be really good!
textByHash.acf9006d9ccf3c2eba096933e556eabd17e4968d: I glamorous weather girl. I get weather numbers to learn how weather work.
textByHash.c48a93cc91d9b20190f0531b4eb7736fa9fa9111: Number getter not for here. Dis one go over there.
textByHash.cab859c371f30278649db7fb20855eca18ee28cd: I have number getter, but is brown and sad.
textByHash.d626b4086a09ae525a9690bd4df428504909d72c: You no good sail her. Windys topple you.
textByHash.f42e664d924673d04db2cb0bdfcfda4dcdd84199: Number getter good now! You take it and find where windy no do the blowing. You get the numbers and bring back to me! I try myself, but I just follow wind round in circles. Make sure you no do that!
